login.title: Log in
login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access your workspace
login.serverError: Could not reach the server. Is the backend running?

signup.title: Create an account
signup.subtitle: Join Killio and start organizing your work
signup.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
signup.serverError: Could not reach the server. Is the backend running?
signup.communicationsOptIn: I want to receive product updates and occasional communications from Killio.
signup.communicationsHint: Optional. You can change this preference later.
signup.termsRequired: You must accept the Terms of Service to create an account.
signup.footerLegal: By registering, your consent is stored with your account.

title.login: Get back into Killio without losing the thread.
title.signup: Set up a cleaner operating flow from the first session.

description.login: Boards, documents, decisions, and recent movement stay connected once you sign back in.
description.signup: Create your account, accept the legal terms once, and start with a workspace structure ready for delivery instead of chaos.

signal.title: Execution signal
signal.body: See what moved, what stalled, and what needs attention without hunting through tabs.

docs.title: Boards and docs together
docs.body: Keep planning, writing, and delivery context inside the same product surface.

governance.title: Clear operational rules
governance.body: Roles, history, notifications, and consent all stay visible from the start.

card.title: Auth should feel like an entrypoint, not a detour.
card.body: The login and signup flow now matches the public landing direction so the product feels coherent before and after authentication.
